security_trigger_reason: implementation touches support RBAC, evidence persistence, replay/idempotency and secret redaction boundaries

apps/core/src/support/support-evidence.ts:199 redacts support refs, action fields, closure criteria, residual risk and notes before normalizedRequestHash and persistence
packages/db/src/support.ts:467 update claims and row locks enforce replay/conflict handling before incident mutation; packages/db/src/support.ts:724 preserves idempotent update state

apps/core/src/support/support-canonical-refs.ts:234 release refs require F-0026 inspection and failed evidence maps degraded/missing; apps/core/src/runtime/runtime-lifecycle.ts:1894 validates F-0024 auth evidence from audit rows

notes: PASS: d733b7d redacts support evidence refs/actions/closure text before hash and persistence, keeps support write routes behind F-0024 admission, claims update/action-routing idempotency before owner routing, validates auth/release evidence through owner readers, and exposes support incidents only through admitted operator reads. No high-confidence exploitable findings.
